The difference between this DNC and MCH set is changing x3 DET melds to DH (one DET meld changed to DH on each of the gloves, legs, and bracelet) - but would no longer be compatible with NIN/VPR bis accessories. The MCH set is within 1 dps of this set so they're virtually equivalent for DNC.

(XivGear meld solver shows the MCH meld set simming higher only because it assumes infinite time. In reality, the set with the 3 det melds will sim higher on average when a greater % of damage occurs under devilment (i.e. favorable kill time fights) due to how DET and DH interact with the % DH devilment buff.)
